overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an indoor crew quarters or barracks with metal bunk beds, wooden floors, and industrial decor. The character walks through the room, examines the surroundings, and approaches an NPC near a desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew quarters with metal bunk beds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the bunk room examining the sleeping quarters and storage areas

entered.detail: stacked metal bunk beds with mattresses and pillows arranged along the wall
light-colored wooden plank flooring covering the room
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the shelving
tall metal shelving unit with various stored items
wall-mounted industrial light fixture providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow crew quarters with metal bunk beds lining the right side. The room features wooden floors, industrial wall lighting, and metal shelving units with cardboard boxes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common area with meeting table

events.description: character turns right to explore the central area of the room with the table

agents.ego_description: turning right to examine the central table area and the far wall with lockers

entered.detail: large wooden table with papers and items scattered on the surface
green cushioned office chair with metal frame near the table
tall metal locker cabinet against the far wall
doorway leading to an adjacent room or corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a more open central area featuring a wooden table with a green office chair. The metal bunk beds are now visible on the left as the camera pans, and a metal locker stands against the far wall near a doorway.

events.description: character turns left and walks toward the desk area with the computer

agents.ego_description: walking toward the desk area to approach the crew member working at the computer

notable_agents.action: standing at the desk looking at the computer terminal

entered.detail: wall poster featuring an eagle with star emblem above a small cabinet
wooden office desk with computer monitor and various office supplies
computer monitor and keyboard setup on the desk
red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall near the desk

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and enters an office nook featuring a wooden desk with a computer terminal. An NPC crew member stands at the desk on the right, while an eagle emblem poster hangs on the left wall above metal shelving. The character approaches the desk area, passing a fire extinguisher mounted on the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow crew quarters that gradually opens into a functional office nook. It begins by moving past metal bunk beds and industrial shelving units along a wooden floor, guided by wall-mounted lighting. As the character turns right, the space expands into a central area featuring a wooden table with a green office chair and a metal locker positioned near a distant doorway. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left to enter a small office nook, passing a wall-mounted fire extinguisher. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a wooden desk equipped with a computer terminal, where an NPC crew member stands beneath an eagle emblem poster.
